fato_historico: 1958: In the 14 July Revolution in Iraq, the monarchy is overthrown by popular forces led by Abd al-Karim Qasim, who becomes the nation's new leader.
energia_do_dia: Today brings a dynamic shift in your personal narrative, Gemini. Much like when popular currents turn the tide to invite a new chapter in history, you may feel an inner awakening. It is a good time to reconsider old structures in your life and embrace a refreshing change that aligns with your true, sparkling spirit.
frase_do_dia: Open your heart to the winds of change and find your new rhythm.
significado_numero: Represents the balance between your dual nature and newfound social leadership.
conselho: Embrace bold changes today and trust your own path forward with great confidence.
